free_text: Investigation of the formation of residual nuclei from
radioactive 237-Np and 241-Am targets in reactions
with 660-MeV protons
in Russian (see COMMENT)
an English
prelim. table.
in Russian - final analysis
an English
- data tables
- Decay data.
A special system of codes for complex analysis of the
experimental data.
See sample.
The second targets (30-min exposures) were measured
11 times for 30 d with exposures from 5 to 50 h.
The first targets after short exposure started
10 min. after the end of irradiation. These targets
were measured 17 times during 17 hours. The measurement
time varied from 5 minutes to 3 hours.
The errors in the tables are the largest
deviation of the given cross section from the average
-weighted cross section of several measurements.
Needed correction for self-absorption and dead time
were included.
Cascade-evaporation model.
Cross sections of products produced in the aluminium
capsule were measured:
4-Be-7     5.5+/-0.5 millibarns
11-Na-22  16.4+/-1.4 millibarns
11-Na-24  12.3+/-1.1 millibarns
By compiler.
1. Authors' determination of cumulative cross
section includes the events, which are named as
"ind/m+" in EXFOR. The cross sections are placed in
"ind" tables by compiler.
2. Mistake in Tbl.2 (Br-84 -> Rb-82m) of YF,65,797.
Compiler checked Tbl. 2 from AND,29,1,1983 and found
that all decay data shown for Br-84 are corresponded to
Rb-82m instead of Br-84.
SD: ref. on translation added.
Col. ERR-T renamed to DATA-ERR in Subents 2-5.
Correction according Memo CP-D/797
SD: Refs. FCY/L,2; PPN/L,2 added. Part of
COMMENT was updated. BIB updated. Tables were checked
and corrections were made. MONIT-ERR added. Free text
at REL-REF deleted (see text under REF). Data corrected
according to final publication in Phys.Part.Nucl.Lett.2
Comment deleted. All corrections were made after
discussion with Dr.V.S.Pronskikh.
Two targets of americium oxide were used
(oxide density, 11.7 g/cm3).
Weight    thickness  irrad.time  activity  proton flux
(g)         (mm)     (min)        mCi      10**14/min
The irradiated target samples were hermetically packed
in aluminium capsules.
With suitable filter. HPGe detector with an
efficiency of 20% and an energy resolution of
1.8 keV(1332-keV 60Co)
- By compiler. All products are shielded ones, except
as noted.
The authors assumed Y-84-m production as independent,
but experimental data for decay scheme of Zr-84 are not
enough.
